name: Italian Game: Evans Gambit
description: Line trainer for the Italian Game: Evans Gambit, generated from the canonical opening database (lichess-org/chess-openings): 22 positions drilled book-move by book-move from White's side across 41 named variations. Cards are introduced shallow-to-deep, shuffled across lines within each depth; the back gives the line so far, the variation name and ECO code.
